info.name: ERPNext HRMS API — Documented
info.description: HR portal API with real field names from Cognifyr ERPNext instance. All POST/PUT bodies use actual field names.

body.raw:
{
  "doctype": "Appointment Letter",
  "job_applicant": "rahul.gupta@example.com",
  "company": "Cognifyr",
  "appointment_date": "2025-06-21",
  "appointment_letter_template": "Test Appointment Letter Template",
  "introduction": "Test introduction",
  "terms": "Test terms"
}
